markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games’ confirmation of a November 19, 2026 release for GTA VI, following the May 2025 shift from Fall 2025 and the November 2025 extension for additional polish, has fixed a clear window through July 31, 2026 that structures trader activity around interim cultural, tech, and political milestones. Take-Two Interactive’s repeated public reaffirmations have minimized further delay risk and channeled volume into high-liquidity options such as GPT-6 release, new albums from Playboi Carti and Rihanna, and geopolitical resolutions. Marketing campaigns and any late-2026 trailer drops could indirectly influence sentiment by sustaining visibility, yet the market’s focus remains on verifiable external developments that can resolve independently before the game ships on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrials in Harvey Weinstein’s third New York retrial, combined with the 2024 overturn of his original conviction and active appeals against the separate 16-year California sentence, have driven trader consensus toward No Prison Time at 80.2%. At age 74 with documented health concerns, the disgraced producer benefits from procedural setbacks that have repeatedly stalled additional convictions, while plea discussions and consecutive-sentence considerations limit upside for longer terms. Historical patterns in high-profile appeals and the industry’s focus on #MeToo accountability further shape sentiment, though unresolved charges and California proceedings remain swing factors ahead of potential plea resolutions or further court dates.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vegas Golden Knights hold a 62.5% implied probability as 2026 Stanley Cup favorites in the ongoing final against the Carolina Hurricanes, reflecting trader consensus on their 2-1 series lead after three high-scoring contests. Vegas advanced by sweeping the Presidents’ Trophy-winning Colorado Avalanche in the Western Conference Finals and has shown strong defensive structure and timely scoring from players like Mitch Marner. Carolina reached the final with minimal postseason losses overall but dropped Game 3 in double overtime despite a four-goal third-period rally, marking its first road defeat of the playoffs. The Hurricanes’ possession-heavy style and home-ice advantage in upcoming games provide realistic comeback paths, keeping the matchup competitive despite the current series edge.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Knicks hold an overwhelming edge in the 2026 NBA Championship market after capturing a 2-0 lead in the Finals with road victories in Games 1 and 2, including a 105-95 win in San Antonio. The Spurs, despite Victor Wembanyama’s elite production and a strong regular-season record, face mounting pressure from early deficits and recent miscues as the series shifts to Madison Square Garden. These developments have compressed the implied probability heavily in the Knicks’ favor while leaving the Spurs with realistic comeback potential in a best-of-seven format.

Their 11-game postseason winning streak, bolstered by Jalen Brunson’s scoring and playmaking alongside Karl-Anthony Towns’ rebounding and spacing, has driven the shift in trader consensus toward New York. The Spurs, despite Victor Wembanyama’s elite production and a strong regular-season record, face mounting pressure from early deficits and recent miscues as the series shifts to Madison Square Garden. These developments have compressed the implied probability heavily in the Knicks’ favor while leaving the Spurs with realistic comeback potential in a best-of-seven format.

markets.question: Will MegaETH perform an airdrop by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MegaETH launches a token and performs an airdrop by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market "locked" tokens or non-swappable tokens will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes". Airdrops of NFTs will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market is on-chain information and official information from MegaETH, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

events.title: MegaETH airdrop by...?
events.description: this is a market on MegaETH airdrop

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The tightly bunched probabilities among Spain, France, England, Portugal, and Argentina reflect a balanced 2026 World Cup field entering the expanded 48-team tournament. Spain and France share the narrow lead on the back of recent European Championship pedigree, deep attacking options, and strong qualifying campaigns, while England sits close behind after consecutive major final appearances and Premier League depth. South American sides retain historical strength despite select absences, and mid-tier European contenders add further parity through solid recent Nations League and friendly results. Minor injury concerns and final roster adjustments have prevented any single team from pulling away in trader consensus ahead of the June 11 kickoff.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's consolidated authority over the Chinese Communist Party, military, and state institutions underpins the 93% trader consensus against his removal before 2027. Public appearances, including a May 2026 summit with U.S. President Trump in Beijing and March policy directives on health initiatives, signal ongoing leadership without disruption. Analysts note the absence of a designated successor and expectations for a fourth term at the 21st Party Congress in autumn 2027 further reinforce stability through the market's December 2026 resolution window. Any shift would require unprecedented events such as sudden illness or factional upheaval, neither of which has materialized.

Key differentiators include executive experience versus ideological positioning and fundraising capacity. Consolidation could occur through 2026 midterm outcomes, early polling trends among primary voters, and outreach to key demographics ahead of the primary calendar.

markets.question: Will LeBron James win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.
